---
title: "New BioGenies paper in Bioinformatics - meet HaDeX2! 📄🧬"
date: "03/16/2026"
categories:
  - HaDeX
  - publications
description: "Our new Bioinformatics paper introduces HaDeX2 🧬 - a tool for multi-dimensional analysis of HDX-MS data. Explore it via web server or R package."
# image: "../fig/tools/hadex.png"
---

---

🎉 **New paper out!** We’re happy to share that our latest work has been published in **Bioinformatics** 📄🧬  

👉 https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/42/3/btag128/8524920  

---

# 🔗 Try it yourself

- 🌐 Web server: [Open HaDeX2 Web App](https://hadex2.mslab-ibb.pl/)  
- 💻 GitHub (R package): [HaDeX2 on GitHub](https://github.com/hadexversum/HaDeX2)  

HaDeX2 is freely available both as an **R package and web server**, making it easy to use regardless of your workflow.

---

# 🎧 Prefer listening?

We know HDX-MS and structural proteomics can get a bit… intense 😄 

That’s why we’ve also prepared a **short audio explanation 🎧** of the paper — perfect if you want the big picture without diving into all the details.

<audio controls>
  <source src="../audio/HaDeX2.m4a" type="audio/x-m4a">
  Your browser does not support the audio element.
</audio>

---

# 🔬 What is it about?

The paper introduces **HaDeX2**, a tool for analyzing **hydrogen–deuterium exchange mass spectrometry (HDX-MS)** data — a key technique for studying **protein structure and dynamics**.  

HDX-MS experiments generate complex data across multiple dimensions (time, sequence, experimental conditions, replicates), which makes interpretation challenging. 

HaDeX2 addresses this by providing a **standardized, multi-dimensional analysis framework** that integrates these aspects into a single workflow.  

---

# 📊 Key takeaways

- 🧬 HDX-MS data should be analyzed **across multiple dimensions simultaneously**  
- ⚙️ HaDeX2 provides a **reproducible and standardized workflow**  
- 📈 It enables **statistical inference and clear visualization** of protein dynamics  
- 💻 Works both as a **web tool and R package**, lowering the barrier for users  

In short:  

👉 **HaDeX2 helps turn complex HDX-MS data into interpretable biological insights**  

---

# 💚 Team effort

Huge thanks to everyone involved in this project - from development to validation and writing 🙌  

We’re excited to see how **HaDeX2** will be used by the community to better understand protein dynamics 🧬✨

![](../fig/tools/hadex.png "HaDeX2 - multi-dimensional analysis of HDX-MS data")
